category_sources: source_facts.description says C++ Insights lets users see source code through the eyes of a compiler; official repository repeats that positioning.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub repository brand the project as C++ Insights.
docs_sources: Official C++ Insights website is the primary user surface; official repository README provides project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/andreasfertig/cppinsights, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository describe compiler-view source-code insight/transformation behavior.
